overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a spacesuit following a giant segmented sand worm across a dusty, post-apocalyptic wasteland toward distant industrial ruins. The environment features hazy, warm-toned lighting with atmospheric dust storms and sparse vegetation covering the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy wasteland with giant sand worm

events.description: sand worm begins burrowing into the ground creating a dust cloud
sand worm fully submerges underground leaving a fading dust trail

agents.ego_description: closely pursuing the giant segmented worm across the dusty grassland, maintaining a steady pace behind it

notable_agents.action: giant segmented sand worm with armored plates crawling through grass and kicking up dust clouds

entered.detail: giant segmented creature with metallic armored plates moving through the grass
distant industrial complex with smokestacks and ruined buildings visible through the haze
patchy dry yellow-brown grass covering the wasteland ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a giant segmented sand worm crawling through a hazy, dry grassland. The creature moves from center to right before burrowing underground around the 6-second mark, creating dust clouds. In the distance, industrial ruins are visible through the warm, orange-tinted haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky wasteland transitioning toward industrial complex

events.description: terrain becomes rockier with large boulders appearing as the creature disappears
character navigates around large rock formations on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the rocky wasteland toward the distant industrial structures, navigating around obstacles

entered.detail: jagged boulders and rock outcrops scattered across the terrain
sparse dry shrubs and desert vegetation

segments.scene_description: With the sand worm now gone, the character moves through a rockier section of the wasteland. Large boulders and rock formations appear on the right while scattered bushes dot the left. The industrial ruins grow slightly larger in the center view as the character approaches, navigating the uneven terrain.

events.description: dust clouds swirl more intensely around the character as wind picks up

agents.ego_description: steadily approaching the industrial ruins through the hazy grassland, maintaining a consistent pace

entered.detail: scattered metal wreckage and pipes on the ground
tall industrial chimneys rising from the ruin complex

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a long approach through open grassland toward the industrial complex. The ruins are now prominently visible in the center-near distance, with tall smokestacks distinguishable. The character passes scattered industrial debris on the left while dust continues to blow across the terrain. The vegetation becomes slightly denser with more bushes visible along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey across a dusty wasteland that transitions from a creature-led pursuit into a steady approach toward distant industrial ruins. It begins by following a giant segmented sand worm as it crawls through hazy, dry grassland before burrowing underground and leaving behind swirling clouds of dust. As the creature vanishes, the camera moves forward into a rockier stretch of terrain where large boulders and scattered bushes frame the path toward the orange-tinted horizon. The scene then opens into a wide expanse of grassland, passing industrial debris on the left as the distant ruins grow more prominent. Finally, the movement culminates in a direct approach toward the industrial complex, where tall smokestacks become clearly distinguishable through the blowing dust and thickening vegetation.
